Trusted Denver Concrete Experts

Denver's Concrete Experts

Built to last in Colorado's toughest climate. We pour foundations, driveways, and patios that stand up to Denver's freeze-thaw cycles.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Mark T.

Apex replaced our cracked 1980s driveway in Lakewood with a reinforced 6-inch slab. Two winters later - not a single crack despite the heavy plow traffic. Crew cleaned up every bit of concrete splatter from our historic brick porch.

L
Lisa H.

The team stabilized our settling Arvada ranch home with helical piers. No more sticking doors, and they preserved our prized blue spruce roots during excavation. Detailed engineering report helped with our refinance appraisal.

C
Carlos R.

Our new heated patio in RiNo gets used year-round. The crew suggested adding radiant cables during the pour - best decision ever for Denver winters. Finish matches our industrial loft's concrete floors perfectly.

D
Danielle K.

Apex handled all the permits and city inspections for our Capitol Hill sidewalk replacement. They worked around our 100-year-old maple tree without damaging roots. Neighbors keep asking who did the work.

Additional Concrete Services

Driveway Installation Foundation Repair Concrete Patios Sidewalk Replacement

Apex Concrete — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every concrete project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Concrete Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific concrete needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Denver & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Denver, CO and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Aurora Lakewood Arvada Littleton Highlands Ranch Centennial Parker Westminster
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our concrete services.

How soon can I park on my new driveway?

Wait 7 days for passenger vehicles. We'll provide a cure timeline based on weather - summer pours set faster than winter installations.

Do you handle permits?

Yes. Denver requires permits for any driveway replacement. We include this in our quote and file the paperwork.

Built on Denver Values

Get a same-week assessment with one of our lead concrete specialists.

Let's Begin →
